summary: Comprehensive testing of Auto-Healing Engine feature. All 53 backend API tests passed (3 skipped due to cooldowns). Frontend Auto-Heal tab fully functional with all 5 healing actions, enable/disable toggle, recovery path visualization, and healing timeline. Existing features (login, products, cart, dashboard tabs) continue to work correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/healing/status - returns 200 with all 5 actions, current SRI, recommendations
GET /api/healing/recommendations - returns current_sri, recommendations array, recovery_path array
GET /api/healing/history - returns healing history array
POST /api/healing/toggle {enabled: true} - enables auto-healing (admin only)
POST /api/healing/toggle {enabled: false} - disables auto-healing (admin only)
POST /api/healing/trigger {action_id: 'cache_flush'} - executes cache flush
POST /api/healing/trigger {action_id: 'rate_limit'} - executes rate limiter
POST /api/healing/trigger {action_id: 'circuit_breaker'} - executes circuit breaker
POST /api/healing/trigger {action_id: 'connection_pool_reset'} - executes connection pool reset
POST /api/healing/trigger {action_id: 'queue_drain'} - executes queue drain
POST /api/healing/trigger rejects invalid action_id with 400
POST /api/healing/trigger respects cooldown (returns error within cooldown period)
Toggle/Trigger endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Toggle/Trigger endpoints require admin role (403 for non-admin)
Auto-Heal tab appears in admin dashboard
Auto-Heal tab shows Engine Status with Enable/Disable button
Auto-Heal tab shows Recovery Path with recommendations
Auto-Heal tab shows Manual Healing Actions with 5 execute buttons
Auto-Heal tab shows Healing Timeline with action history
Clicking Enable/Disable toggles the auto-healing engine
Execute buttons show cooldown state when action is on cooldown
Existing features: login, products, cart, all 6 dashboard tabs working
critical_code_review_comments: HealingEngine class well-structured with proper cooldown management
All 5 healing actions correctly target their respective nodes (Cache, API, Backend, DB, Queue)
Recovery path algorithm correctly prioritizes actions by urgency and SRI impact
Frontend Auto-Heal tab has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements

success_rate.backend: 100% (53/53 tests passed, 3 skipped due to cooldowns)

seed_data_creation: None - healing actions work on in-memory metrics aggregator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Healing Engine fully implemented and tested. All 5 healing actions (cache_flush, rate_limit, circuit_breaker, connection_pool_reset, queue_drain) have cooldowns (60-180s). When testing trigger endpoints, check can_execute status first or expect 400 if on cooldown. Frontend Auto-Heal tab at /dashboard with data-testid attributes: toggle-autoheal-btn, heal-{action_id}-btn for each action.

healing_feature_verification.status_endpoint: /api/healing/status returns engine status, all 5 actions, current SRI, recommendations
healing_feature_verification.trigger_endpoint: /api/healing/trigger requires admin, executes action, respects cooldown
healing_feature_verification.frontend_tab: Auto-Heal tab shows Engine Status, Recovery Path, Manual Actions, Timeline
